scores.notes: The response describes design decisions and includes isolated code snippets but never presents a complete src/charm.py file. There is no runnable charm class — only fragments showing _fqdn(), the relation.data write, and the idempotency check. The patterns described are all correct and idiomatic: relation_joined + relation_changed observation, writing to self.unit databag, socket.getfqdn(), skipping no-op writes. metadata.yaml is shown but only the provides section. The missing complete charm.py means complete scores 1 rather than 2.
